summary: CafeCentral full-stack testing complete. All 9 backend pytest tests pass (public endpoints, auth gating, saved cafes CRUD+idempotency, reviews POST+ordering). Frontend critical flows verified: Home (hero, ambiance toggle, 6 cafes), Directory (search, filter chips), Cafe Detail (gallery, map iframe, open-in-maps), ProtectedRoute redirect to /login when logged out, Dashboard vault load+remove with seeded session, Community feed (4 seeded reviews shown, sign-in prompt when logged out, review form posts and prepends to feed when authenticated). Auth tested via MongoDB-seeded session_token (cookie + Bearer header). No critical bugs found.

ui_bugs.issue: Rating stars appear as outlined glyphs for both filled and unfilled states; difference is only via opacity which is subtle. Consider using filled (★) vs outlined (☆) glyphs or stronger color contrast.

action_items: Optional: Improve rating-star contrast/filled-glyph distinction on review cards for accessibility (LOW priority).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: get_current_user / auth/logout duplicate the cookie+Bearer extraction logic - could be factored into a helper.
server.py: POST /auth/session does not delete previous sessions for the same user; sessions can accumulate over re-logins (minor cleanliness).
server.py: No length/profanity validation on review text - any non-empty string accepted (consider min/max length).
server.py: Rating clamped to 1-5 server-side which is good; cafe_id is NOT validated against the known cafes list (a review for an arbitrary cafe_id is accepted).
test_credentials: Google OAuth only - tested using MongoDB-seeded mock sessions per /app/auth_testing.md. Test users/sessions seeded fresh per run and cleaned up.
seed_data_creation: Backend seeds 4 mock reviews on startup if reviews collection empty (verified). Test users and review/save data created via mongosh and removed in fixture teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_cafecentral_api.py - run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v. They auto-seed and clean up a test user via mongosh against test_database. For browser-side authenticated testing, seed a session in db.user_sessions and add a session_token cookie (domain=cafecentral-preview.preview.emergentagent.com, secure, sameSite=None). The community cafe-select is a native HTML <select> - use page.select_option, not click.
